Here's the alignment of the transcript with the final code:

```json
[
  {
    "text": "this one's called distribute coins in a",
    "code": [
      "class Solution {",
      "    int num_moves;",
      "    public int distributeCoins(TreeNode root) {",
      "        num_moves = 0;",
      "        give_coins(root);",
      "        return num_moves;",
      "    }"
    ]
  },
  {
    "text": "this one's called distribute coins in a",
    "code": [
      "    public int give_coins(TreeNode node) {",
      "        if (node == null) return 0;",
      "        int left = give_coins(node.left);",
      "        int right = give_coins(node.right);",
      "        num_moves += Math.abs(left) + Math.abs(right);",
      "        return node.val + left + right - 1;",
      "    }",
      "}"
    ]
  },
  {
    "text": "this one's called distribute coins in a",
    "code": [
      "    public int give_coins(TreeNode node) {",
      "        if (node == null) return 0;",
      "        int left = give_coins(node.left);",
      "        int right = give_coins(node.right);",
      "        num_moves += Math.abs(left) + Math.abs(right);",
      "        return node.val + left + right - 1;",
      "    }",
      "}"
    ]
  }
]
```
Note: The text "this one's called distribute coins in a" appears multiple times in the provided transcript, hence it is matched with the entire code solution, which seems to have been discussed extensively around the same lines.
